series_metadata.series_description: File contains Claim Forms and winning tickets for winners that receive prize payments over a period of years. File may also include legal documents, multiple ownership affidavits, interoffice communications, ticket recovery results reports, security reports, etc. as required, other documents, such as, certified drawing reports may be included in the file for events such as millionaire or special drawings.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area until the claim is paid in full, scan into system, then shred hard copy. ; Electronic: Retain digital copy until seven (7) years after the claim is paid in full, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
